offer: For insurance brokers processing 10–20 claims/month, delays in claims processing cause client dissatisfaction. We monitor claims status and flag delays instead of manual tracking through phone calls and emails.
problem: Delays in claims processing lead to client dissatisfaction and potential loss of business.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance brokers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar tools
DM outreach to insurance brokers with demo video
Participate in forums for insurance workflow discussions
try_it: Let users try Claim status monitoring and Delay flagging notifications on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Develop a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing claims data
